area_anchor: Brikette — If building the guest email map fails during recovery, the system reports success anyway
current_truth: When the guest email map build fails during recovery, the error is caught but the recovery still reports success. This means stuck emails may not actually be recovered even though the system says they were.
next_scope_now: Propagate guest map build failure so recovery correctly reports failure and retries on the next cycle.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: guest map build failure silently reports success
why: If the guest map fails to build during email recovery, the system says recovery worked when it didn't. Stuck guest emails stay stuck with no indication anything went wrong. Staff think everything is fine while guests wait for replies.

intended_outcome.statement: Recovery correctly reports failure when guest map build fails, triggering retry on next cycle.
